Dictionary lookup test

Long-press each word; the gloss is on the line below it.

水

= water

火

= fire

山

= mountain

川

= river

木

= tree

人

= person

犬

= dog

猫

= cat

魚

= fish

鳥

= bird

花

= flower

空

= sky

海

= sea

月

= moon, month

日

= sun, day

星

= star

雨

= rain

雪

= snow

風

= wind

雲

= cloud

本

= book

車

= car

家

= house

学校

= school

先生

= teacher

学生

= student

友達

= friend

家族

= family

母

= mother

父

= father

子供

= child

男

= man

女

= woman

手

= hand

足

= foot, leg

目

= eye

耳

= ear

口

= mouth

頭

= head

心

= heart, mind

愛

= love (kanji)

食べる

= to eat

飲む

= to drink

見る

= to see

聞く

= to hear, to ask

話す

= to speak

読む

= to read

書く

= to write

行く

= to go

来る

= to come

帰る

= to return home

食べ物

= food

飲み物

= a drink

時間

= time, hour

今日

= today

明日

= tomorrow

昨日

= yesterday

朝

= morning

夜

= night

春

= spring

夏

= summer

秋

= autumn

冬

= winter

大きい

= big

小さい

= small

高い

= high, expensive

安い

= cheap

新しい

= new

古い

= old

良い

= good

悪い

= bad

暑い

= hot (weather)

寒い

= cold (weather)

美しい

= beautiful

楽しい

= fun, enjoyable

嬉しい

= happy, glad

悲しい

= sad

白

= white

黒

= black

赤

= red

青

= blue

緑

= green

一

= one

二

= two

三

= three

日本

= Japan (kanji)

東京

= Tokyo

京都

= Kyoto

りんご

= apple

みかん

= mandarin orange

コーヒー

= coffee

お茶

= tea

ご飯

= cooked rice, a meal

パン

= bread

寿司

= sushi

サクラ

= cherry blossom (katakana)

あい

= love (hiragana)

かき

= persimmon / oyster

ケーキ

= cake

きゃく

= guest

アイス

= ice cream

にほん

= Japan (hiragana)

がき

= brat

柿

= persimmon (kanji)

さくら

= cherry blossom (hiragana)

す

= vinegar

む

= archaic verb ending
